meta.title: May Thin Lwin | Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of May Thin Lwin, a Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer based in Yangon, Myanmar, specializing in scalable web applications and enterprise systems.

profile.name: May Thin Lwin
profile.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
profile.tagline: 9+ years building high-performance web applications, microservices, and enterprise systems for corporate groups and international clients.

about.name: about
about.description: Full-stack engineer with deep experience across the entire software lifecycle.
paragraphs: Nearly 9 years engineering high-performance web applications, microservices, and enterprise ecosystems — from legacy refactoring and secure backend APIs (Laravel, Node.js, NestJS, Express.js, Spring Boot) to type-safe frontend architectures (Vue.js, React, Next.js, TypeScript).
Proven track record leading development teams, driving engineering best practices, and delivering scalable solutions that reduce administrative overhead and technical debt.

experience.name: experience
experience.description: Leading teams and shipping enterprise-grade products since 2017.

projects.name: projects
projects.description: Scroll vertically through selected work — or use the nav rail and arrow keys.

skills.name: skills
skills.description: Technologies I use to build and ship production systems.

contact.name: contact
contact.description: Have a project or opportunity? Send a message — I typically respond within 24 hours.

bootLines.output: Laravel  Node.js  Vue.js  TypeScript  PostgreSQL  AWS

experience.description: Led the complete overhaul and modernization of an outdated, high-maintenance legacy system into a fast, automated HRIS Platform, significantly improving system performance.
highlights: Engineered scalable Node.js cron-job microservices for complex leave cycle resets and automated data regenerations.
Designed dynamic approval workflows and automated notifications using Laravel and Node.js.
Implemented secure asset pipelines by integrating AWS S3 storage for file, image, document uploads and downloads.
Optimized dashboard performance and database queries to render complex relational metrics in real-time.

experience.description: Led development teams and engineered solutions ranging from event booking to online learning platforms and complaint management systems.
highlights: Built an Event Booking & Management System specialized in event creation, visitor registration, and data exports.
Developed an interactive Online Learning Platform with gamification features (achievements, goals, rewards).
Engineered BroadBand Complaint Management System using Zend and Oracle.

projects.title: Enterprise HRIS Platform (Refactoring & Modernization)
projects.description: Enterprise HRIS for HR teams and employee self-service across attendance, leave, payroll, and overtime — built on Laravel REST APIs, Vue.js frontend, Node.js Temporal workflow workers , according to Myanmar payroll compliance (NRC, SSB, tax claims).
features: Architected Laravel REST APIs using Next Architecture (Domain-Driven design) with type-safe Spatie Data DTOs and generated TypeScript contracts.
Integrated Temporal workflow workers for durable async processing: bulk imports/exports, leave generation, payroll runs, and notifications.
Can be defined by roles/modules from the admin platform.
Multi-auth: OTP, biometric, Azure, Microsoft, device login for mobile/kiosk.

projects.title: HR Admin Platform (Multi-Company Workforce Management)
projects.description: Enterprise HR admin platform for multi-company workforce management — employees, leave, attendance, payroll, and internal comms in one web workspace.
features: Laravel Queue Horizon for background job processing.
Policy-driven leave engine: prorata accrual, rollover, auto-approve, balance checks.
Payroll pipeline: generation, payslips, income tax, partial payments.
Bulk import/export for employees, leave, attendance, and payroll data.

projects.title: Point of Sales (POS) System
projects.description: Comprehensive POS system with inventory management, stock control, sales tracking, and admin dashboard.

projects.title: Online Learning Platform
projects.description: Interactive education web app for grade-based book learning. Users can report, comment, and rate books. Achievements, goals, and rewards included gamification.

projects.title: E-Commerce Backend
projects.description: Created e-commerce website with diverse products. Admin can manage items, while users can order, pay by card/cash, and get home delivery. Implemented features for order processing, product details, and delivery management. Additionally, facilitated export of items information between customers and admin.
features: Export of items information between customers and admin
